title: Bridge Essay: Functional reorganization of the brain in distinct frequency bands during eyes-o

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Formless/Absorption** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Formless absorption — meditative absorption, samadhi, jhana, trance states, transcendental meditation, non-ordinary states of consciousness.

**Functional reorganization of the brain in distinct frequency bands during eyes-open meditation.** — Conscious Cogn. PMID: 39491426. DOI: 10.1016/j.concog.2023.103590. Meditation is aself-regulatory process practiced primarily to reduce stress, manage emotions and mental health. The objective of this work is to study the information exchange between electrodes within and across the hemispheres during meditation using functional connectivity (FC) measures. We investigate the changes in the coherence between EEG electrode pairs during the meditation with open eyes practiced by long-term Brahmakumaris Rajyoga meditators and during listening to music by controls...

notes: Auto-acquired from PubMed/MEDLINE on 2026-07-12. Phase 8 (Formless/Absorption). Evaluation: Excellent (score=11.5)
